calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Order Compelling Accounting And For Order For Turnover Of Trust Funds By Former Trustee Charlene Monroe
Off Calendar Nov-21-2025 Text Ruling

Petition For Order Confirming Order Compelling Accounting And For Order For Turnover Of Trust Funds By Former Trustee Charlene Monroe
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Continued To Oct-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Dobrov, Esq., for and with Mardell Monroe, Petitioner/Successor Trustee.
Charlene Monroe, in propria persona, former Trustee.

At the outset, the court confirms with Ms. Monroe that she objects to the relief in the petition and offers testimony to advocate for her position. Counsel, Mr. Monroe, and Ms. Monroe presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the petition.

The matter is set for an evidentiary hearing on October 24, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Ms. Monroe to file a verified response for request for surcharge by August 26, 2025 and serve Mr. Dobrov a copy.

Mr. Dobrov to file a response by September 16, 2025.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported

Petition For Order Confirming Order Compelling Accounting And For Order For Turnover Of Trust Funds By Former Trustee Charlene Monroe
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Continued To Aug-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Order Compelling Accounting And For Order For Turnover Of Trust Funds By Former Trustee Charlene Monroe
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Continued To Jun-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (personal):
Michael Dobrov, Esq., for and with Mardell Monroe, Petitioner/Successor Trustee.
Charlene Monroe, in propria persona, former Trustee.

At the outset, the court confirms with Ms. Monroe that she objects to the relief in the instant petition and offers testimony to advocate for her position. The court advises Ms. Monroe that she will need to formally file her objections. Counsel, Mr. Monroe, and Ms. Monroe presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the instant petition. Mr. Dobrov reports that he is ready to review documents mentioned by Ms. Monroe in her testimony and file a second amended petition. There is discussion of selling the Estate's real property but the current tenant will need to be evicted first in order to maximize proceeds from the sale of the home. Mr. Monroe advises that he has retained counsel to help with the eviction.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Jun-24-2025 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Mr. Dobrov is instructed to file an amended petition by Jun-03-2025. Ms. Monroe is instructed to file any objections to the amended petition by Jun-17-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Order Compelling Accounting And For Order For Turnover Of Trust Funds By Former Trustee Charlene Monroe
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Continued To May-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Dubrov for and with Mardell Monroe, Petitioner.
Charlene Monroe, Former Trustee.

Charlene Monroe stated that she previously turned over documents to prior counsel and claimed to have provided accounting records to a mediator. She presented documents, including bank statements and handwritten notes, to the Court. Mr. Dubrov stated that a formal accounting is still required. He asserted that Charlene Monroe was removed as trustee due to concerns about trust management and that a proper accounting must be provided to determine the status of trust assets, including rents received, expenditures, and any unaccounted funds. He further noted that tax returns for 2022, 2023, and 2024 have not been filed, and this issue remains outstanding.

The Court questioned whether an unlawful detainer action had been filed, and Ms. Monroe confirmed that she had attempted to evict a tenant but was denied standing due to her removal as trustee.

The court granted Mr. Dubrov leave to amend his petition to request appointment of an independent referee to conduct a formal accounting at Charlene Monroe's expense. The court continued the matter to May 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Confirming Order Compelling Accounting And For Order For Turnover Of Trust Funds By Former Trustee Charlene Monroe
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Continued To Mar-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trustee; Request For Accounting Of Trustee; And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Vernon Goins, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for and with Mardell Monroe, in court, Petitioner.

Charlene Monroe, in court, in propria persona, Successor Trustee.

At the court's query, Ms. Monroe reports that she did not receive a copy of the court's Order to Show Cause why she should be permanently suspended or removed, dated Dec-20-2023. Counsel and Ms. Monroe presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the instant petition. The court and parties discuss mediation and the parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Apr-17-2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Apr-24-2024. The Parties are to return on May-01-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The parties are to monitor the court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the minute order. The bond issue is discussed. Mr. Goins reports that his client does not currently qualify for the bond amount suggested by the court and proposes the court either consider lowering the bond or issuing an order to place trust funds in a blocked account. After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to grant the instant petition, remove Ms. Monroe as Trustee and appoint Mr. Monroe as Successor Trustee. Terms of the accounting are discussed specifically, deadlines for Ms. Monroe to provide Mr. Goins with an accounting. Mr. Goins is instructed to submit a proposed order to the court including the deadlines discussed in court.

The Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trustee; Request For Accounting Of Trustee; And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Continued To Feb-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Charlene Monroe (pro per) appeared in person.
Vernon Goins appeared via zoom for and with Mardell Monroe (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding Ms. Monroe not providing the accounting to her brothers, that she had offered to buy out the siblings by taking a loan out to, that she payout each sibling $400,000.00 each, and that she had a check for $30,000.00 and disbursed $10,000.00 to each sibling.

The Court temporarily suspends Charlene Monroe as successor trustee. Order to Show Cause will be issued to Charlene Monroe (successor trustee.) to appear on February 06, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why she should not be suspended or removed as trustee. Petition to remove trustee for breach of trustee etc., is also continued to that date.

The Court orders Mardell Monroe as temporary successor trustee, Counsel to provide appropriate bond amount.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bernado. Not reported.
